heading: Wildcard Usage Examples
body:
Wildcard `"*"` collections are not supported on this
data store.

The following examples use an online archive with the
following settings:

| Store Name          | adlStore                                                                                                  |
| ------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Online Archive Name | v1$atlas$archive$testCluster$sample\_airbnb$219eb1cb-20a6-4ce3-800a-aaefd6c227c6$66d512939b1fa57fe057aa22 |
